result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet docs [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  add           Add documentation project (.docsproj) to the solution.
  build         Build documentation from assemblies
  update        Update .docsproj files to use the latest DotNetDocs.Sdk version
                from NuGet.

Run 'dotnet docs [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Usage: dotnet docs [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  add           Add documentation project (.docsproj) to the solution.
  build         Build documentation from assemblies
  update        Update .docsproj files to use the latest DotNetDocs.Sdk version
                from NuGet.

Run 'dotnet docs [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Add documentation project (.docsproj) to the solution.

Usage: dotnet docs add [options]

Options:
  -o|--output      Optional. Output directory for the docs project. Defaults to
                   the project folder.
  --name           Optional. Name for the docs project. Defaults to solution
                   name + '.Docs'.
  -s|--solution    Optional. Path to solution file (.sln or .slnx)
  -t|--type        Optional. Documentation type (Mintlify, DocFX, MkDocs,
                   Jekyll, Hugo, Generic). Defaults to Mintlify.
  --prerelease     Optional. Use the latest prerelease version of DotNetDocs.Sdk
                   instead of the latest stable version.
  --skip-solution  Optional. Skip adding the project to the solution file.
                   Useful for CI/CD or standalone documentation projects.
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information.

commands.payload:
Add documentation project (.docsproj) to the solution.

Usage: dotnet docs add [options]

Options:
  -o|--output      Optional. Output directory for the docs project. Defaults to
                   the project folder.
  --name           Optional. Name for the docs project. Defaults to solution
                   name + '.Docs'.
  -s|--solution    Optional. Path to solution file (.sln or .slnx)
  -t|--type        Optional. Documentation type (Mintlify, DocFX, MkDocs,
                   Jekyll, Hugo, Generic). Defaults to Mintlify.
  --prerelease     Optional. Use the latest prerelease version of DotNetDocs.Sdk
                   instead of the latest stable version.
  --skip-solution  Optional. Skip adding the project to the solution file.
                   Useful for CI/CD or standalone documentation projects.
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information.

result.stdout:
Build documentation from assemblies

Usage: dotnet docs build [options]

Options:
  -a|--assembly-list    Optional. Path to assembly list file. Defaults to
                        assembly-list.txt in current directory.
  -o|--output           Output path for documentation
  -n|--namespace-mode   Namespace mode (File/Folder)
                        Default value is: File.
  -t|--type             Documentation type (Default/Mintlify/Json/Yaml)
                        Default value is: Default.
  --api-reference-path  API reference path
                        Default value is: api-reference.
  -?|-h|--help          Show help information.

commands.payload:
Build documentation from assemblies

Usage: dotnet docs build [options]

Options:
  -a|--assembly-list    Optional. Path to assembly list file. Defaults to
                        assembly-list.txt in current directory.
  -o|--output           Output path for documentation
  -n|--namespace-mode   Namespace mode (File/Folder)
                        Default value is: File.
  -t|--type             Documentation type (Default/Mintlify/Json/Yaml)
                        Default value is: Default.
  --api-reference-path  API reference path
                        Default value is: api-reference.
  -?|-h|--help          Show help information.

result.stdout:
Update .docsproj files to use the latest DotNetDocs.Sdk version from NuGet.

Usage: dotnet docs update [options]

Options:
  -p|--project    Optional. Project name or path to .docsproj file to update. If
                  not specified, updates all .docsproj files in current
                  directory.
  -r|--recursive  Optional. Search for .docsproj files recursively in
                  subdirectories.
  --prerelease    Optional. Update to the latest prerelease version of
                  DotNetDocs.Sdk instead of the latest stable version.
  -?|-h|--help    Show help information.

commands.payload:
Update .docsproj files to use the latest DotNetDocs.Sdk version from NuGet.

Usage: dotnet docs update [options]

Options:
  -p|--project    Optional. Project name or path to .docsproj file to update. If
                  not specified, updates all .docsproj files in current
                  directory.
  -r|--recursive  Optional. Search for .docsproj files recursively in
                  subdirectories.
  --prerelease    Optional. Update to the latest prerelease version of
                  DotNetDocs.Sdk instead of the latest stable version.
  -?|-h|--help    Show help information.

staticCommands.name: add
staticCommands.description: Add documentation project (.docsproj) to the solution.

options.description: Optional. Name for the docs project. Defaults to solution name + '.Docs'.
Optional. Output directory for the docs project. Defaults to the project folder.
Optional. Use the latest prerelease version of DotNetDocs.Sdk instead of the latest stable version.
Optional. Skip adding the project to the solution file. Useful for CI/CD or standalone documentation projects.
Optional. Path to solution file (.sln or .slnx)
Optional. Documentation type (Mintlify, DocFX, MkDocs, Jekyll, Hugo, Generic). Defaults to Mintlify.
Optional. Path to assembly list file. Defaults to assembly-list.txt in current directory.

staticCommands.name: update
staticCommands.description: Update .docsproj files to use the latest DotNetDocs.Sdk version from NuGet.

options.description: Optional. Update to the latest prerelease version of DotNetDocs.Sdk instead of the latest stable version.
Optional. Project name or path to .docsproj file to update. If not specified, updates all .docsproj files in current directory.
Optional. Search for .docsproj files recursively in subdirectories.
